task_completion.description: Verify the cooling setpoint for the Middle Floor zones is set to 76°F.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the zone properties or thermostat settings for the Middle Floor zones (M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, M.C25) with the DESIGN-COOL-T or Cooling Setpoint explicitly set to 76.

task_completion.description: Verify the heating setpoint for the Middle Floor zones is set to 71°F.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the zone properties or thermostat settings for the Middle Floor zones (M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, M.C25) with the DESIGN-HEAT-T or Heating Setpoint explicitly set to 71.

task_completion.description: Verify the solar absorptance of the 'Roof Construction' is set to 0.35.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the construction properties for 'Roof Construction' with the ABSORPTANCE or Solar Absorptance value changed to 0.35.

task_completion.description: Verify that the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation was executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the simulation running (e.g., a progress bar, calculation dialog) or a post-simulation summary/results screen indicating the run was completed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the project was saved after making the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent clicking 'File -> Save', a save confirmation dialog, or the save icon being activated.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the building energy modeling software's GUI rather than bypassing it via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the software's graphical interface, opening dialog boxes, and inputting values into the designated fields.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply open the .inp file in a text editor to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modifications should be made within the energy modeling software (e.g., eQUEST), not in Notepad, Vim, or another text editor.

integrity.description: The simulation was genuinely run within the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation dialog or progress window belongs to the actual software and is not a mocked terminal output or a static image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The building model is '4StoreyBuilding'. There are exactly 5 conditioned middle-floor zones that must be updated: South Perim Zn (M.S21), East Perim Zn (M.E22), North Perim Zn (M.N23), West Perim Zn (M.W24), and Core Zn (M.C25). The target cooling setpoint is 76°F (original 75°F) and the target heating setpoint is 71°F (original 72°F) for all 5 zones. The target roof absorptance for 'Roof Construction' is 0.35 (original 0.6). The task requires running the DOE-2.2 simulation and saving the project.
